code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {
        [*] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [*]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {
        [*] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [*]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {
        [*] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [*]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [*]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个熔断器的状态图，核心有三个状态：CLOSED、OPEN 和 HALF_OPEN。CLOSED 是正常状态，OPEN 是熔断状态，HALF_OPEN 是恢复探测状态。
明白了，这三个状态的流转条件是什么？比如什么情况下从 CLOSED 变成 OPEN？
CLOSED 内部有个 Normal 子状态，每次 execute_trade 失败就 IncrementFailures，失败次数达到 3 次就触发 Threshold Reached，进入 OPEN 状态。成功的话就 ResetCount 清零。
好的，我把 CLOSED 状态内部画好了，包含 Normal、IncrementFailures、CheckThreshold 和 ResetCount 这几个子状态。那 OPEN 状态内部需要画什么？
OPEN 状态里，所有调用都会被 BlockCalls 拦截，直接抛 CircuitBreakerError。同时启动 CheckTimeout 计时，60 秒内保持熔断，时间到了就进入 HALF_OPEN 做恢复探测。
确认一下，HALF_OPEN 只允许一个测试调用对吧？成功就回到 CLOSED，失败就重新 OPEN。
对，HALF_OPEN 里的 TestRecovery 只允许一个测试调用，EvaluateResult 判断结果：成功就关闭熔断器，失败的话通过 ReOpen 回到 OPEN 状态。
状态结构都画好了，最后我加个颜色区分：CLOSED 用绿色，OPEN 用红色，HALF_OPEN 用黄色，这样一目了然。
